summary: Iteration 52: Tested admin-configurable booking options feature. Backend tests 11/11 passed. Fixed critical syntax error in contract-template.tsx. Frontend tunnel unavailable (ngrok ERR_NGROK_334).

integration_issues.issue: Expo ngrok tunnel returns ERR_NGROK_334 - 'The endpoint is already online'. This is external infrastructure issue.

feature_1_admin_booking_options_get.details: GET /api/admin/booking-options requires admin auth (401 without, 200 with). Returns array of options with name, price_per_day, enabled fields.

feature_2_admin_booking_options_put.details: PUT /api/admin/booking-options accepts {options: [{name, price_per_day, enabled}]} and persists to agency document. Verified with GET after PUT.

feature_3_public_booking_options.details: GET /api/agencies/{agency_id}/booking-options (public, no auth) returns enabled options only. Disabled options are filtered out. Returns default fallback if none configured.

feature_4_disabled_options_filtered.details: Added TEST_Option Disabled with enabled:false. Public endpoint correctly filtered it out.

feature_5_vehicle_schedule.details: GET /api/admin/vehicle-schedule returns all 6 vehicles including those with 0 reservations: BMW Serie 3, Mercedes-Benz Classe C, Tesla Model 3, VW Golf 8, Audi Q5, Renault Kangoo

feature_6_frontend_booking_options_secti.details: contract-template.tsx has BookingOptionsSection component (lines 11-161) with add/edit/delete/toggle UI. Uses api.get/put for /api/admin/booking-options. Has data-testid attributes.

feature_7_frontend_booking_page_integrat.details: booking/[id].tsx imports api, has agencyOptions state (line 71), useEffect fetches from /api/agencies/{agency_id}/booking-options when vehicle.agency_id is available (lines 82-88). Merges with DEFAULT_OPTIONS on failure.

api_verification_results.admin_booking_options_get: GET /api/admin/booking-options - 200 OK (requires admin auth, returns options array)
api_verification_results.vehicle_detail: GET /api/vehicles/{vehicle_id} - 200 OK (has agency_id field for frontend)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: contract-template.tsx had duplicate PRICE_FIELDS declaration with incomplete array - removed duplicate on line 10
Backend code correctly implements booking_options field on agency document
Public endpoint correctly filters enabled:false options
Frontend BookingOptionsSection has proper UI for add/edit/delete/toggle
booking/[id].tsx correctly fetches agency-specific options via public API

success_rate.frontend: Unable to verify via browser - ngrok tunnel infrastructure issue. Code review confirms correct implementation.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test options that were cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for booking options all working (11/11 tests pass). Fixed duplicate PRICE_FIELDS syntax error in contract-template.tsx. Ngrok tunnel has persistent ERR_NGROK_334 errors - external infrastructure issue. Default options are: GPS(10), Siège enfant(8), Conducteur supplémentaire(15) CHF/jour.

contract_template_syntax_error.issue: Duplicate const PRICE_FIELDS = [ declaration on line 10 that was incomplete (no closing bracket)
contract_template_syntax_error.root_cause: Likely copy-paste error when adding BookingOptionsSection component
contract_template_syntax_error.fix: Removed the duplicate incomplete declaration, kept the complete one on line 182

rca_of_issues.ngrok_tunnel_unavailable: External infrastructure issue - ngrok tunnel returns ERR_NGROK_334 'The endpoint is already online'. This is not a code issue.
